name: nfl_team_seasonlogs_longest_rush range year_offset takes the window MAX
description: longest_rush over a multi-year window is MAX, not the SUM of per-season bests.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT MAX(nfl_team_seasonlogs.longest_rush) FROM nfl_team_seasonlogs WHERE nfl_team_seasonlogs.tm = player.current_nfl_team AND nfl_team_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025) AND nfl_team_seasonlogs.stat_key = 'QB_TOTAL') AS "nfl_team_seasonlogs_longest_rush_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
